_about: Deterministic lookup cascade. lookup.sh executes in order; first success wins.

steps.action: on fetch exit 1: GET /search?q={cmd}, refetch best hit

exit_codes.0: stdout is man page JSON - answer ONLY from this
exit_codes.1: not found - say not found, never hallucinate flags
exit_codes.2: L3_PROXY_BLOCK - tell user: curl -s https://climan.dev/mac/{cmd} | jq .
exit_codes.3: TW-003 - command blocked as demo/test case
